name: Maple Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter or margarine and sugar until smooth.
2. Add the maple syrup, eggs, salt, and vanilla. Mix together thoroughly.
3. Stir in the pecans.
4. Preheat the oven to 450°F (232°C).
5. Bake for 5 minutes at 450°F, then reduce the temperature to 350°F (177°C) and continue baking for about 40 minutes, or until set.
6. Makes one 9-inch pie.
